articles.title: 5 American cruise ship passengers leave Nebraska quarantine facility - AP News
articles.description: Five American cruise ship passengers exposed to hantavirus are leaving a Nebraska quarantine facility. U.S. health officials say they will complete monitoring at home after remaining symptom-free. They arrived in Nebraska three weeks ago following a deadly ha…
